name: The Great Library
text: Have 2 units with the Scientist attribute here to complete.
flavor: Knowledge is the only treasure that multiplies when shared.

name: The Colosseum
text: Have warriors with combined strength of 15+ here to complete.

name: The Silk Road
passive: Units here generate 1 gold at start of your turn.
text: Have 3 units with different attributes here to complete.
flavor: A thread that stitched the world together.

name: The Agora
text: Have diplomats with combined charisma 12+ here.
flavor: Where words were worth more than swords.

name: Machu Picchu
passive: Units entering here cannot be targeted by events until your next turn.

name: The Forge
text: No mission. +1 strength to all units here.

name: Alexandria Harbor
passive: You may look at the top card of your main deck at any time.

name: The Bazaar
passive: Players with a unit here pay 1 less gold on Buy actions (minimum 1).
flavor: Everything has a price — just not always gold.

name: The Great Wall
text: Have 3 Warriors here to complete. A unit here may rotate this location for 0 AP.
flavor: They could not go over it.

name: Versailles
passive: Your Politician units here get +1 charisma.
text: Have Politicians with combined charisma 20+ here.
flavor: Excess as a form of government.

name: Sherwood Forest
passive: Units here with 7+ cunning cannot be targeted by strength contests.
text: Have a unit with 7+ cunning here.

name: The Arena
passive: Strength contests here get +1 bonus for the initiator.

name: The Observatory
text: Have Scientists with combined cunning 14+ here.
flavor: The stars do not lie — if you know how to read them.

name: Trade Port
passive: Generates 1 gold at start of your turn if a Diplomat is here.
text: No mission. Gold income with Diplomat.
flavor: Ships come and go. Gold stays.

name: The Catacombs
passive: Units here cannot be injured by events.
